fields.title: Port codex-rs agent definitions to tau
fields.description:
Copy and adapt codex-rs subagent .md files to tau format.

## Agents to port
From /home/ribelo/projects/ribelo/codex/codex-rs/core/src/subagents/:

1. **oracle.md** → agents/oracle.md
   - Expert reasoning, planning, code review
   - read-only sandbox
   
2. **finder.md** → agents/finder.md  
   - Fast code search
   - read-only sandbox
   
3. **general.md** → agents/general.md
   - General-purpose task execution
   - workspace-write sandbox
   
4. **librarian.md** → agents/librarian.md
   - Deep multi-repo codebase analysis
   - read-only sandbox
   
5. **painter.md** → agents/painter.md
   - Frontend specialist
   - workspace-write sandbox
   
6. **review.md** → agents/review.md
   - Code review
   - read-only sandbox
   
7. **rush.md** → agents/rush.md
   - Fast/cheap for trivial tasks
   - workspace-write sandbox

## Adaptations needed
- Update YAML frontmatter to match tau's SandboxConfig format
- reasoning_effort → thinking
- Keep system prompts mostly unchanged
fields.close_reason: Ported all requested agents from codex-rs to extensions/tau/agents/
